பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.விவரங்கள்: The lesson provides a comprehensive list of produce, which is essential for basic vocabulary and categorization questions in competitive exams: Vegetables: Tomato, Cauliflower, Chilli, Brinjal, Drumstick, Garlic, Radish, Beetroot, Carrot, Lemon, Yam, Potato, Onion. Fruits: Banana, Orange, Grapes, Watermelon, Jackfruit, Mango, Papaya, Apple, Pineapple. Identification: Students learn to describe them (e.g., Lemon is yellow and sour; Chilli is green and spicy).

பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.தலைப்பு: 2. Story: "A Feast in the Jungle" (Animal & Food Associations)
பாடக்குறிப்புகள்.விவரங்கள்: This story is very important for matching-type questions. Various animals bring specific items to contribute to a forest feast: Rabbit: Carrots (to make Halwa). Parrot: Lemons (to make Juice). Bear: Brinjals (to make Sambar). Monkey: Tomatoes (to make Rasam). Crow: Mangoes (to make Payasam). Deer: Green leaves (to make Soup). Fox: Onions (to make Pachadi). Duck & Bird: Fruits (to make Salad). Value: Sharing and community celebration.

Short 'a' sound: ant, pan, cat, rat, ham, dam, had, mad, map, cap. Short 'e' sound: den, hen, pen, set, bet, wet, led, bed, red, beg, leg, peg. Short 'i' sound: tin, pin, bin, kit, sit, wit, did, lid, bid, zip, sip, dip, nib, bib, rib.

Character: Appu is an elephant who is a farmer. Conflict: The field is dry, and Appu decides to sell the land because he cannot continue farming. Resolution: His friends (Rat, Rabbit) encourage him and promise to help. It rains, providing the right time to work. Moral: "Teamwork never fails." They work together and have a successful harvest.
Healthy Food: Fruits, vegetables, idli, greens. Junk Food: Ice cream, noodles, pizza, burger, chips, french fries. Message: Avoid junk food and follow a healthy diet.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What is the main theme of the first English unit in Term 2?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The entire unit is centered around fruits, vegetables, farming, and distinguishing between healthy and junk food.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Name a vegetable that is described as "green and spicy."
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: In the vocabulary section, a chilli is identified and described as green and spicy.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which fruit is "yellow and sour"?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Students learn to describe a lemon as yellow and sour.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: In the story "A Feast in the Jungle," what did the Rabbit bring?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Rabbit brought carrots to the feast to make Halwa.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What did the Parrot want to make for the feast?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Parrot brought lemons to make juice for everyone.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which animal brought brinjals to make Sambar?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: According to the story, the Bear contributed brinjals to make Sambar.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: The monkey brought ________ to make Rasam. (Fill in the blank)
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Monkey brought tomatoes to prepare Rasam for the jungle feast.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What did the Crow contribute to the feast?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Crow brought mangoes in order to make Payasam.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which animal brought green leaves for the soup?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Deer brought fresh green leaves to make soup.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Who brought onions for the Pachadi?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: In the story, the Fox is the one who brought onions to make Pachadi.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What dish was made by the Duck and the other birds?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The Duck and the Bird brought various fruits to make a fruit salad.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What was the reaction of the animals when they tasted the food?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: They celebrated their feast by sharing the delicious food and found it very tasty.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: In "Appu's Delightful Day," what is Appu's job?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Appu, the elephant, works as a farmer in the field.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Why did Appu want to sell his land initially?
ஆப்ஷன்கள்: He wanted to buy a house
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Appu felt he couldn't continue farming because his field was completely dry.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Which animals helped Appu in his field?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: His friends, including the Rat and Rabbit, encouraged him and promised to help with the farming.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What is the important moral taught in Appu's story?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The story emphasizes that when friends work together, they succeed. Thus, "Teamwork never fails."

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Identify one "a" sound CVC word from the lesson.
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: From the given phonics list, 'cat' has the short 'a' sound, while the others have 'e' or 'i' sounds.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: Is "Pizza" classified as healthy food or junk food in the textbook?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: Under the Health Awareness section, pizza is listed among items like ice cream and burger as 'Junk Food'.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: "I am red and round. You use me to make Rasam." Who am I?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: The monkey used tomatoes (which are red and round) to make Rasam.

கேள்விகள்.கேள்வி: What natural event helped Appu and his friends start working in the field?
கேள்விகள்.விளக்கம்: It finally rained, which softened the dry field and provided the right time for them to work together.
